name: Herbalist
description: Knows which plants cure and which ones kill. Sometimes the difference is the dose. Lives half in the garden and half in the woods.
dialogue_hooks: offering a remedy for that cough you didn't know you had
asking if you've seen a particular plant growing anywhere unusual
warning about a poisonous look-alike near the settlement
needing someone to gather ingredients from a dangerous area
voice_patterns: gentle grandmother — medicine wrapped in comfort
sharp-eyed scientist — clinical and precise about dosages
wild woman — half feral, speaks to plants more than people
worried healer — there's a sickness coming and not enough supplies
